ie.updateNote: Since early October 2023 a series of protests have taken place, and continue across the country, including in areas frequented by Irish tourists. A transport strike, road blockades, and energy/water cuts have been observed nationwide. Visitors to the country can track the protests and blockades in real-time here [Google docs link, Spanish only]. This provides an up to date list of protests and roa

au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:05 March 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise a high degree of caution in Guatemala overall due to the threat of violent crime. Higher levels apply in some areas. The Guatemalan Government has declared a state of prevention due to the threat of organised crime and gang activity.
